name: Sentry
description: Sentry API tools for listing organizations and projects and reviewing issue details inside OpenClaw

authToken.label: Auth token
authToken.help: Sentry API bearer token with read access to organizations, projects, and issues

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Defaults to https://sentry.io and also supports self-hosted Sentry instances

defaultOrganizationSlug.label: Default organization slug
defaultOrganizationSlug.help: Used when sentry_list_projects, sentry_list_issues, or sentry_get_issue omit organizationSlug

defaultProjectSlug.label: Default project slug
defaultProjectSlug.help: Applied when sentry_list_issues is called without an explicit projectSlug
